user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: IKEA
Product type: KALLAX shelf unit
Tone: functional, approachable, modern
Visual style: Clean, minimalist visuals with bright, natural lighting emphasizing simplicity and versatility.
Conceptual technique: practical lifestyle demonstration
Format: image

brief.visualStyle: Clean, minimalist visuals with bright, natural lighting emphasizing simplicity and versatility
brief.headline: Organize Your Life, Your Way
brief.subHeadline: The KALLAX shelf unit adapts to every space and style
brief.bodyCopy: Discover a storage solution as flexible as your lifestyle. With KALLAX, create a neat, stylish space that works for you—whether it's books, plants, or keepsakes. Easy to assemble, easy to love.

visualDirection.setting: Bright, airy living room with natural light pouring through large windows
visualDirection.composition: KALLAX shelf unit neatly organized with a mix of books, decorative boxes, plants, and everyday items, positioned centrally
visualDirection.colorPalette: Neutral tones with pops of green from plants and colorful storage boxes
visualDirection.lighting: Soft, natural daylight highlighting the texture and finishes of the shelf unit
visualDirection.props: Functional lifestyle elements such as a cozy chair, a small desk nearby, a coffee mug
visualDirection.model: No people, focus on lifestyle objects to keep it universally approachable
